home.manifesto: ORIGINAL INTERIORS THAT STAY FOR LONGER. WE CREATE INTERIORS WITH A DISTINCT IDENTITY. WE COMBINE DESIGN SENSITIVITY WITH PRECISION AND EXPERIENCE, CREATING SPACES REFINED IN DETAIL AND GROUNDED IN REAL CONTEXT.
home.tagline: ORIGINAL INTERIORS THAT STAY FOR LONGER.
home.section1Text: We design spaces that don't rely on trends. We treat each space individually, as an answer to a specific context and needs. Whether it's a residential or commercial project, we'll create an interior that tells your story.
home.section2Text: We have years of experience in delivering projects of various character — from furniture details, through apartments and houses, to gastronomic, commercial and hotel venues. We manage the process comprehensively, with full control over the final result. This is how refined spaces are created, filled with original, unique elements.

contact.cta: READY TO START A PROJECT TOGETHER?

footer.banner: WE ARE KOOL AND WE DESIGN KOOL THINGS!

studio.title: Studio
studio.manifesto: WE ARE KOOL AND WE DESIGN KOOL THINGS!
studio.intro: A Wrocław-based design studio founded by the dynamic architect duo Ola Kilińska and Ola Leszczyńska. We create distinctive interiors and commercial spaces that are as functional as they are inspiring. Combining disciplines from interior design and strategy to product development and visual identity, we create concepts that unite practicality with beauty. Our spaces do more than work – they resonate, evoke emotion, and leave a lasting impression.
studio.heroImageAlt: Ola Kilińska and Ola Leszczyńska in the Kool Studio workspace
studio.detailImageAlt: Materials and samples in the Kool Studio workspace

commercial.label: Commercial interiors
commercial.heading: Restaurants, concept stores, boutiques, hotels, services
commercial.description: In commercial spaces, design is a tool. We create visually cohesive places that support business and build brand value. We design expressive concepts that consciously shape the user experience. We know that first impressions are made only once.
scopeItems: analysis of assumptions in the context of the interior
defining the character, atmosphere and principles of the venue
support in the approval process with the sanitary inspectorate (Sanepid)
coordination of trades and author's supervision
commercial.sloganHeading: We create places that stay in memory
commercial.sloganText: Beyond functionality and compliance with regulations, our years of experience allow us to create spaces that reflect the brand's character, building its recognition.

residential.label: Residential interiors
residential.heading: Premium apartments and houses
residential.description: We design private spaces thoughtfully, in dialogue with context and residents' needs. We consider daily comfort of use, durability of solutions, and unique approaches. The relationships between materials, colors and textures are important to us. We ensure that aesthetics stem from quality, not fleeting trends.
scopeItems: analysis of residents' needs and expectations
residential.sloganHeading: We create places you want to come back to
residential.sloganText: We guide every project from concept to precise technical documentation, allowing the idea to be translated into a calm and predictable realization. We have experience in both developer and secondary market construction, and we have contacts with verified contractors.

process.label: Comprehensive project
process.heading: We don't treat a project as a single stage. It's a process that requires consistency.
steps: Brief and analysis of needs and budget
process.bottomHeading: We manage the process comprehensively from initial assumptions to the final result.
process.bottomText: We spread decisions over time, from general to specific, which allows us to capture all nuances and avoid random choices. We organize the entire process by eliminating doubts and, thanks to our experience, we facilitate decisions. This allows for a calm realization and a result consistent with the assumptions. As part of a comprehensive project, we support you at every stage.
